_comment: Recommended .claude/settings.json for the Quay project. Copy to .claude/settings.json to activate hooks.

hooks._comment: Block processing of embargoed JIRA tickets (existing Quay hook)
Block JIRA commands on embargoed tickets (existing Quay hook)

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit"; then echo "[hook] Ensuring pre-commit hooks are installed..." >&2; if command -v pre-commit &>/dev/null; then pre-commit install --allow-missing-config 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Ensure pre-commit hooks are installed before git commit (pre-commit runs automatically on commit)

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qP "gh pr create"; then TITLE=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "--title \x27\K[^\x27]+|--title \"\K[^\"]+" || true); if [ -n "$TITLE" ]; then PATTERN="^(\\[redhat-[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\] )?(PROJQUAY-[0-9]+|QUAYIO-[0-9]+|NO-ISSUE): [a-z]+(\\([^)]+\\))?: .+$"; if ! echo "$TITLE" | grep -qE "$PATTERN"; then echo "BLOCKED: PR title does not match required format." >&2; echo "Expected: PROJQUAY-XXXX: type(scope): description" >&2; echo "Got: $TITLE" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Validate PR title format before gh pr create
